_comment: Single source of truth for Yamete's mutation-test catalog. Each entry encodes one production gate that has a corresponding behavioural test cell. The runner (scripts/mutation-test.sh) applies each mutation to a clean working tree, runs the named XCTest, asserts the test FAILS with the expected substring, then reverts via git. See Tests/Mutation/README.md for full architecture.

mutations.description: TrackpadActivitySource.handleTapDown — drop tap-attribution recency gate; external mouse clicks must not be credited as trackpad taps.
MouseActivitySource scrollMonitor — drop empty-phase guard; trackpad-flavoured (phased) scrolls must not be credited as mouse scrolls.
TrackpadActivitySource.handleScrollEvent — drop the phase guard around lastTrackpadGestureAt stamp; mouse-wheel events must not register the user's hand as on the trackpad.
KeyboardActivitySource — change tapRateThreshold default from 3.0 to 0.0; below-threshold rates must not fire keyboardTyped.
mutations.replace: private var tapRateThreshold: Double = 0.0  // key presses / second
mutations.search: private var tapRateThreshold: Double = 3.0  // key presses / second

mutations.description: TrackpadActivitySource.handleTapDown — drop the per-mode enable gate; toggling tappingEnabled=false must suppress all .trackpadTapping reactions.
TrackpadActivitySource.handleScroll — drop empty-phase guard; mouse-wheel scrolls (phase==[]) must not drive trackpad scroll RMS / contact / circle paths.
MouseActivitySource.handleMouseScroll — invert magnitude floor so all events drop; sustained high-magnitude wheel events must fire .mouseScrolled, so dropping all events fails the cell.
mutations.replace: if true { return }  // mutated: drop ALL events
mutations.search: guard mag > 0.5 else { return }  // filter tiny accidental movements

mutations.description: MouseActivitySource.handleHIDClick — drop transport/product attribution filter; SPI built-in trackpads and USB Magic Trackpad clicks must NOT fire .mouseClicked.
MouseActivitySource.handleHIDClick — slam click-gate shut so no click ever fires; legitimate USB mouse clicks must publish .mouseClicked.
TrackpadActivitySource.handleTapDown — slam tap-rate / debounce gate shut; gesture+click within attribution window must still fire .trackpadTapping.
mutations.search: guard rate >= tapMin, now >= tappingGate else { return }

mutations.description: TrackpadActivitySource.evaluateScroll — drop the per-mode sliding enable gate; toggling slidingEnabled=false must suppress all .trackpadSliding reactions.
TrackpadActivitySource.evaluateScroll — drop the per-mode touching enable gate; toggling touchingEnabled=false must suppress all .trackpadTouching reactions.
TrackpadActivitySource.handleScroll — slam tiny-magnitude filter shut; sustained scroll above touching threshold must still fire .trackpadTouching.
